glosses.vi: xác nhận; xác nhận đã nhận
glosses.ja: 確認; 受け取り確認

sentences.target: Ich warte auf die Bestätigung vom Hotel.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə aʊf diː bəˈʃtɛːtɪɡʊŋ fɔm hoˈtɛl/

translations.de: Ich warte auf die Bestätigung vom Hotel.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə aʊf diː bəˈʃtɛːtɪɡʊŋ fɔm hoˈtɛl/
translations.en: I'm waiting for the confirmation from the hotel.
translations.es: Estoy esperando la confirmación del hotel.
translations.pt: Estou esperando a confirmação do hotel.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chờ xác nhận từ khách sạn.
translations.nl: Ik wacht op de bevestiging van het hotel.
translations.hi: मैं होटल से पुष्टि का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Περιμένω την επιβεβαίωση από το ξενοδοχείο.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på bekreftelsen fra hotellet.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på bekräftelsen från hotellet.
translations.da: Jeg venter på bekræftelsen fra hotellet.
translations.ja: ホテルからの確認を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; used with the prepositional complement 'auf + Akk'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces the prepositional object 'die Bestätigung'.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Bestätigung'.
Common noun, feminine; head of the prepositional object governed by 'auf'.
Contraction of 'von dem' (ADP + DET); introduces a dative prepositional phrase marking source/origin; complements with 'Hotel' (Dat. sg.).
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'vom' in dative singular.

sentences.target: Die Bestätigung kommt später per E-Mail.

translations.de: Die Bestätigung kommt später per E-Mail.
translations.en: The confirmation will come later by email.
translations.es: La confirmación llegará más tarde por correo electrónico.
translations.fr: La confirmation arrivera plus tard par e-mail.
translations.it: La conferma arriverà più tardi via email.
translations.zh-Hans: 确认会稍后通过电子邮件发送。
translations.yue: 確認會稍後透過電郵發出。
translations.ru: Подтверждение придет позже по электронной почте.
translations.pt: A confirmação vai chegar mais tarde por e-mail.
translations.vi: Xác nhận sẽ đến sau qua email.
translations.ar: سيصل التأكيد لاحقًا عبر البريد الإلكتروني.
translations.nl: De bevestiging komt later per e-mail.
translations.hi: पुष्टि बाद में ईमेल से आएगी।
translations.el: Η επιβεβαίωση θα έρθει αργότερα με email.
translations.id: Konfirmasi akan datang nanti lewat email.
translations.ro: Confirmarea va sosi mai târziu pe email.
translations.ja: 確認は後でメールで届きます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of the subject 'Bestätigung'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; predicates the subject.
Temporal adverb (comparative form) modifying the verb; indicates time.
Preposition indicating means/medium; introduces 'E-Mail' (instrumental/means, morphologically accusative).
Common noun; object of the preposition 'per', denoting the medium.

sentences.target: Ich brauche die Bestätigung vom Arzt.

translations.de: Ich brauche die Bestätigung vom Arzt.
translations.en: I need the confirmation from the doctor.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin d'une attestation du médecin.
translations.it: Mi serve un certificato del medico.
translations.pt: Preciso de um atestado do médico.
translations.vi: Tôi cần giấy xác nhận của bác sĩ.
translations.ar: أحتاج إلى تقرير طبي من الطبيب.
translations.nl: Ik heb een verklaring van de arts nodig.
translations.id: Saya perlu surat keterangan dari dokter.
translations.sv: Jag behöver ett intyg från läkaren.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de o adeverință de la medic.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for en lægeerklæring.
translations.ja: 医師の診断書が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Bestätigung'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (accusative) of 'brauche'.
Contraction of 'von dem' (ADP + DET); introduces a dative prepositional phrase indicating source/agent-like origin.
Common noun, masculine; object of 'vom' in dative singular.

sentences.target: Wir schicken dir die Bestätigung heute.

translations.de: Wir schicken dir die Bestätigung heute.
translations.en: We'll send you the confirmation today.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天会把确认发给你。
translations.yue: 我哋今日會將確認發畀你。
translations.pt: Vamos te enviar a confirmação hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi sẽ gửi cho bạn xác nhận.
translations.nl: We sturen je de bevestiging vandaag.
translations.hi: हम आज तुम्हें पुष्टि भेज देंगे।
translations.el: Σήμερα θα σου στείλουμε την επιβεβαίωση.
translations.nb: Vi sender deg bekreftelsen i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kami akan mengirimkan konfirmasi untukmu.
translations.sv: Vi skickar bekräftelsen till dig idag.
translations.da: Vi sender dig bekræftelsen i dag.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (here present, 1st person plural form); ditransitive, taking a dative recipient and an accusative theme.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of 'schicken'.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Bestätigung'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (accusative) of 'schicken'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates the time of sending.
